items.text: Campus Players Present: The Cherry Orchard! March 3-7 at 7:30 PM in Anderson Hall. Tickets just $5 at the door. Don’t miss this funny and moving show. Bring your friends!

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what is the price of a ticket?
questions.explanation: The flyer states 'Tickets just $5 at the door'.

questions.stem: According to the flyer, where will the show take place?
questions.explanation: The flyer states the show takes place in Anderson Hall.

items.text: Free yoga in the quad this Saturday at 10 AM! Bring your own mat and water. All levels welcome. I tried it last week and felt amazing. See you there!

questions.stem: According to the post, what time does the yoga class start?
questions.explanation: The post says the class is 'this Saturday at 10 AM'.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the person who wrote the post?

options.A: They have never done yoga before
options.C: They enjoyed a previous yoga session
options.D: They think the class is too easy

questions.explanation: The writer says 'I tried it last week and felt amazing,' indicating they enjoyed a prior experience.
